case_title: AMELIA A WHITE VS. KARIM BUSTAMI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,160.00 FILED BY WHITE, AMELIA A AS TO DEFENDANT BUSTAMI, KARIM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-16-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2015 - JUDGMENT.
CORRESPONDENCE RE:JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITE, AMELIA A
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-10-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-10-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-10-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT BUSTAMI, KARIM
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WHITE, AMELIA A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUSTAMI, KARIM $2,160.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,210.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY NOT LATER OCTOBER 26, 2015 DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF AT 2851 GLISTENING GROVE AVE. HENDERSON, NV 89052, THE FURNITURE WHICH IS THE SUBJECT OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIF FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHITE, AMELIA A
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF WHITE, AMELIA A
CORRESPONDENCE RECEIVED IN REGARDS TO JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BUSTAMI, KARIM
